sanskrit:
कच्चिदेतच्छ्रुतं पार्थ त्वयैकाग्रेण चेतसा।
कच्चिदज्ञानसंमोहः प्रणष्टस्ते धनञ्जय॥
transliteration:
kaccid etac chrutaṃ pārtha tvayaikāgreṇa cetasā |
kaccid ajñāna-sammohaḥ praṇaṣṭas te dhanañjaya ||
literal_meaning: O Pārtha, have you heard this with one-pointed mind? Has your delusion born of ignorance been dispelled, O Dhanañjaya?
contextual_meaning: A final therapeutic check-in: the mentor verifies that the client has integrated the insight and is free from cognitive-emotional fog.
psychological_state: Post-insight consolidation; ego no longer fused with anxious narratives, yet still needing confirmation before autonomous action.
trigger_scenario: After a long therapy session or immersive retreat you ask yourself: ‘Did I really get it, or will the old patterns return tomorrow?’
anchor_text: Has your confusion cleared and your mind become steady?
